sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_xml (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO test_xml (id, xml_data) VALUES (1, '<note><to>Tove</to><from>Jani</from><heading>Reminder</heading><body>Don't forget me this weekend!</body></note>');

DECLARE _result VARCHAR; _result := xml_validate_dtd((SELECT xml_data FROM test_xml WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3 LIMIT 1), 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100'); SELECT _result AS validation_result;

DECLARE _result VARCHAR; _result := xml_validate_dtd('<root><child>Test</child></root>', 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100'); SELECT _result AS validation_result WHERE _result IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS error_count, xml_validate_dtd(xml_data, 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100') FROM test_xml GROUP BY id HAVING LENGTH(xml_validate_dtd(xml_data, 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100')) BETWEEN 0 AND 100;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (id INT, num_col NUMERIC(10, 2), str_col VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO complex_data (id, num_col, str_col) VALUES (1, 99.99, 'a'), (2, NULL, 'b'), (3, 0.01, NULL);
SELECT * FROM complex_data WHERE str_col IS NOT NULL AND num_col BETWEEN 0.00 AND 100.00;

SELECT xml_validate_dtd((SELECT str_col FROM complex_data WHERE id = 1), 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100') AS validation_result, num_col FROM complex_data WHERE num_col IS NOT NULL;
